query: WITH latest AS ( SELECT DISTINCT ON (slug) slug, version, description, use_count, last_used_at, created_at FROM skills WHERE tenant_id = $1 AND kind = 'skill' AND status = 'published' ORDER BY slug, created_at DESC ) SELECT slug, version, description, use_count, last_used_at, created_at FROM latest WHERE use_count < $2 AND (last_used_at IS NULL OR last_used_at < now() - make_interval(days => $3)) ORDER BY last_used_at ASC NULLS FIRST, use_count ASC LIMIT $4
